title: habenaria clavigera
intro: Habenaria clavigera, also known as the clubbed orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia, specifically in the Himalayas and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Habenaria clavigera include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin problems, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary tract issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and powders that are consumed orally to reap its health benefits.
